name: 8pc (Set of 4) 4c Plastic Food Storage Container Set Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
Store a variety of leftovers in the fridge with ease with the 8-Piece (Set of 4) 4-Cup Plastic Food Storage Container Set from Room Essentials™. Made from polypropylene, this set includes four 4-cup containers with solid blue lids. Great for helping keep foods fresh, the set is also top-rack dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
